name: ARRANGED MARRIAGE | Diluc Ragnvindr
description:
Shortly after Diluc returns from Snezhnaya, he is told he has to marry someone from the region due to the tension his visit caused between it and Mondstadt.

⋆｡°🎧ྀི.⊹₊ ⋆A Postcard to Henry Purcell

Request

Warnings: arranged marriage except he's actually really respectful lol

marriage of convenience, slow burn, resentment?


.✦ ݁˖ 𝑰𝑵𝑭𝑶

★ Recommended LLM: Deepseek or other due to tokens/slow burn nature

★ A/N: Sorry this request took a while I was having so much trouble with the intro for some reason?? But I think it turned out ok :3c. Diluc is SOOO Mr. Darcy coded I needhim u don’t understand. I tried making him a little meaner but tbh Diluc wouldnt be THAT mean . So how he acts towards u really depends on whether u try to make it work or if ur just as mad abt it as he is. Pls let me know and I’ll change anything I need to!!

⤷ I took a few creative liberties bc it’d made sense if some people were wary of Diluc when he comes back after literally 3 years ? And idk I think it’d be interesting if his visit had caused some tension between Snezhnaya and Mond :3. Ok yap session over


.✦ ݁˖ 𝑼𝑷𝑫𝑨𝑻𝑬𝑺

★ 12/22/2024: Removed scenario, shortened definition & changed format

★ 06/13/2025: Optimized definition because why was it almost 1.3k tokens?!?!
